glass.$description: Glass surface tokens — combined frosted (backdrop-filter blur+saturate) + liquid (SVG displacement filter). Three depth levels per the existing GlassCard.stories.tsx pattern.
glass.$$_frosted: _____ FROSTED LAYER (backdrop-filter) — unified NavPill recipe (2026-05-26 token consolidation). All glass surfaces except homepage ProjectEnvelope cards converge on this single blur/saturate/chroma triple so visual treatment stays consistent across NavPill, cards, dialogs, and modals.

frostedBlurSurface.$description: Frosted blur — unified to 20px across all tiers per the NavPill recipe (2026-05-26). Surface tier intent: shallow cards/containers. Blur is constant across tiers; tiers differentiate via alpha + shadow.

frostedBlurRaised.$description: Frosted blur — unified to 20px (was 12px). See frostedBlurSurface rationale.

frostedBlurFloating.$description: Frosted blur — unified to 20px (was 18px). See frostedBlurSurface rationale.

frostedSaturate.$description: Color saturation boost through the frosted layer. 180% (1.8) per the NavPill recipe (was 162% from 2026-05-21 Migrim tuning).

frostedChroma.$description: OKLCH chroma applied to glass background fills (2026-05-26). 0.012 matches the NavPill recipe — subtle tint that doesn't compete with content. Was 0.02 hard-coded in mp/globals.css glass-bg formula.

frostedBorderWidth.$description: Border width on every glass surface (2026-05-26). 1.5px matches the NavPill recipe (was 1px in .glass class). Slightly more presence makes the edge highlight read at typical card sizes.

frostedBg.$description: Frosted plate tint. 10-12% gray gives milky look without crushing legibility.

frostedBorderLight.$description: Top edge highlight border in light mode

frostedBorderDark.$description: Top edge highlight border in dark mode (reduced for contrast)

glass.$$_liquid: _____ LIQUID LAYER (SVG displacement filter) — static, no canvas regen _____

liquidDisplacementScale.$description: feDisplacementMap scale. Subtle default — set 0 to disable. Tune via the consuming app's <GlassFilterDefs/> SVG. Reference demo used scale 20 — production keeps subtler so text stays readable.

liquidFilterId.$description: SVG filter id consumed via filter: url(#glass-liquid). The consuming app must mount a matching <defs><filter id=...> somewhere in the document tree (typically root layout).

specularColor.$description: Specular peak color at cursor position

specularMixBlend.$description: Blend mode for specular layer (overlay = pops against any bg)

glass.$$_alpha: _____ PER-TIER ALPHA PRIMITIVES (ADR 0024 phase 3 — moved from mp/globals.css) _____

alphaSurfaceLight.$description: Surface tier translucency in light mode (most translucent — kit-home aesthetic)

alphaSurfaceDark.$description: Surface tier translucency in dark mode (denser glass)

alphaRaisedLight.$description: Raised tier translucency (cards, popovers) light mode

alphaFloatingLight.$description: Floating tier (hero cards, sheets) light mode

alphaChromeLight.$description: Chrome tier (nav, fixed UI) light mode — high opacity for readability

alphaChromeDark.$description: Chrome tier dark mode — lerps to 0.72 (was 0.88) to match the NavPill recipe. The depth engine still resolves to 0.88 at full light and 0.72 at full dark; the slightly lower dark alpha lets the page colour bleed through enough to feel like glass.

glass.$$_radius: _____ RESPONSIVE RADIUS PRIMITIVES (mp composes via media query) _____

radiusMobile.$description: Glass surface radius on mobile (<768px) — 24px, on the single tight scale (was 24px).

radiusDesktop.$description: Glass surface radius on tablet+ (>=768px) — 24px, collapsed onto the tight scale (was 36px).
